MayBeConst:DatabaseFactoryTest.kt$DatabaseFactoryTest.Companion$// Run Flyway migrations + create a non-superuser app role ONCE per class. // RLS bypass-by-table-owner is the canonical Postgres footgun; the // test must connect as a non-owner role to exercise real RLS posture. private val appPassword = "dietician_app_test_pw"
MayBeConst:RateLimiter.kt$RateLimiter.Companion$// Council 1779120000 RC9 + spec §5.5 baseline limits. val DEFAULT_LIMIT: Int = 30
